entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Staple food crop in Niger, Sorghum bicolor L. Moench

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: Country where sorghum is produced and experimental sites are located

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: Stenodiplosis sorghicola Coquillett 1898, a pest constraining sorghum production

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the crop, a key trait for improvement

entities.name: MIDGE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist infestation by sorghum midge

entities.name: YIELD-CONTRIBUTING TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that influence the overall grain yield

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among sorghum inbred lines

entities.name: ALPHA LATTICE DESIGN
entities.description: Experimental design used to conduct the trial with two replications

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the relationship between grain yield and midge resistance

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: The total variation in genotypes accounted for by principal components

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: Process of crossing midge-resistant genotypes from different clusters to create new genotypes

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: Presence of variation for traits under study in the tested germplasm
